summary: Monster pacing is acceptable for MT0: the minimum route uses a low-tax greenSlime at [6,10], mid redSlime at [6,7], and threshold blackSlime at [6,4] with a redPotion compensation at [6,6]. Side branches add distinct bat/redSlime/blackSlime costs around protected rewards. No zone or repulse sources are placed, so special-damage review is not applicable.
